metadata.description: Epistemic-discipline skills for agentic coding — how an agent knows things before, during, and after work. One package, seven self-triggering skills. Composes with the superpowers workflow layer.

plugins.name: epistemic-skills
plugins.description: The full collection in one install: using-epistemic-skills (router) + applying-formal-rigor + blindspot-pass + evidence-research + write-goal + gauntlet + evidence-locked-uat. Each skill activates only when its own trigger matches.
